Home Entities Iran

Iran

Country

Objectives

Stated

  • 2026-04-10 "We did not seek war and do not want it" — Source: Iranian Supreme Leader via Brief-2215 (Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye, BBC, SCMP, The Hindu)
  • 2026-04-13 Iran's Defense Ministry: country has plenty of drones and missiles for "effective offensive warfare to inflict further defeat on the enemy" — Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)
  • 2026-04-13 Iran calls US demands on uranium enrichment "unrealistic" — Source: TASS (Russia-aligned), The Hindu (India)

Revealed

  • 2026-04-13 Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has severe and disfiguring wounds from compound strike on Supreme Leader's compound in central Tehran; injury to one or both legs — Source: The Hindu (India), Western Wire (Western)
  • 2026-04-13 Iran threatens retaliation against Gulf ports for US naval blockade — Source: BBC (Western), Al Jazeera (Middle East), Reuters (Western)
  • 2026-04-13 Iran says will charge ships from hostile nations tolls to cross Hormuz; navy confirms full control over Strait despite US blockade — Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned), RT (Russia-aligned), Al Jazeera (Middle East)
  • 2026-04-13 Iran denies charging tolls for Indian tankers specifically (contradicting earlier reports about tolls on hostile nations) — Sources: Middle East Eye (Middle East)
  • 2026-04-13 Iran positioned dozens of oil-loaded tankers near Strait of Hormuz; experts estimate up to 170 million barrels on these tankers — Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned), Al Jazeera (Middle East)

Inferred

  • (No entries yet)

Claims & Track Record

  • 2026-04-15 Claimed (Iran): communications with US through mediator continue. Outcome: pending. Source: Iranian Foreign Ministry

Divergences

  • 2026-04-14 Stated (Trump): Iran wants a deal. Revealed (Iran state media): Iran emphasizes "piracy" and defiance in rally rhetoric. Confidence: MEDIUM
  • 2026-04-14 Stated (Iran): US "Stone Age comments" show inability to accept Iran's power — Sources: France24 (Western)
